article_title: Russians turn to cash, putting more strain on slowing wartime economy

tasks.prompt: What is the main argument of the article?
options: Russia's wartime economy is strengthened because cash has disappeared
A growing preference for cash is adding pressure to an already slowing Russian wartime economy
Russia has replaced the rouble with a foreign currency
Digital payments have become compulsory across Russia
tasks.correct_answer: A growing preference for cash is adding pressure to an already slowing Russian wartime economy
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה מסבירה שהמעבר הגובר לשימוש במזומן מוסיף לחץ לכלכלה רוסית שכבר מאטה בזמן מלחמה.

tasks.prompt: Why can cash be attractive to people or businesses trying to avoid official scrutiny?
options: It always earns higher interest
It offers greater anonymity than traceable electronic payments
It can be used only for luxury goods
It automatically reduces inflation
tasks.correct_answer: It offers greater anonymity than traceable electronic payments
tasks.explanation_hebrew: מזומן מספק אנונימיות רבה יותר מתשלומים דיגיטליים הניתנים למעקב.

tasks.prompt: Why can a rise in cash circulation make economic management harder?
options: It gives authorities less visibility over transactions and can support tax avoidance
It guarantees higher government revenues
It removes the need for banks
It makes every business more profitable
tasks.correct_answer: It gives authorities less visibility over transactions and can support tax avoidance
tasks.explanation_hebrew: עלייה בשימוש במזומן מקשה לעקוב אחר עסקאות ועלולה להקל על התחמקות ממס.

tasks.prompt: Which broader problem is repeatedly linked to Russia's wartime economy in the article?
options: A large budget deficit and pressure on state revenues
A shortage of foreign tourists only
Falling demand for all basic necessities
A complete end to military spending
tasks.correct_answer: A large budget deficit and pressure on state revenues
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה קושרת את השימוש במזומן ללחץ רחב יותר על התקציב, הגירעון והכנסות המדינה.

tasks.prompt: What does 'buffer' mean in the article's economic context?
options: A tax on small businesses
A financial cushion against shocks
A ban on cash withdrawals
A military payment system
tasks.explanation_hebrew: בהקשר כלכלי, buffer הוא כרית ביטחון פיננסית שמסייעת להתמודד עם זעזועים.

tasks.prompt: Which sentence best summarizes the relationship described in the article?
options: More cash use can hide activity from the formal economy, weakening tax collection while public finances are already strained
Cash use proves that inflation has fully ended
The Russian economy is growing rapidly because all shops use bank cards
The government no longer needs oil and gas revenues
tasks.correct_answer: More cash use can hide activity from the formal economy, weakening tax collection while public finances are already strained
tasks.explanation_hebrew: זהו הקשר המרכזי בכתבה בין שימוש במזומן, כלכלה לא-רשמית ולחץ על הכנסות המדינה.

tasks.prompt: Give two reasons mentioned or implied in the article for why Russians may prefer cash.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש לציין שתי סיבות כגון אנונימיות, חשש משיבושים, הימנעות ממעקב או מס, או שימוש במזומן ככרית ביטחון.
expected_points: Cash can still work when digital systems are disrupted
Some people or firms may try to avoid taxes or scrutiny
People may keep cash as a buffer against uncertainty

tasks.prompt: How can increased cash use hurt government revenues?
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש להסביר שעסקאות מזומן קשות יותר למעקב ולכן חלק מההכנסות והמסים עלולים לא להיות מדווחים.
expected_points: Cash transactions are harder to trace
Unreported turnover can reduce tax collection
Lower revenues worsen pressure on a budget deficit

tasks.prompt: Write a 2-3 sentence summary connecting cash use, economic slowdown and the wartime budget.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש לחבר בין העלייה בשימוש במזומן, הקושי לעקוב אחר פעילות כלכלית, האטת הצמיחה והלחץ על תקציב המדינה בזמן מלחמה.
expected_points: Explains reduced transparency or tax collection
Connects the trend to budget or revenue pressure

tasks.prompt: Explain one advantage and one disadvantage of cash during a period of economic uncertainty.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש להציג יתרון אחד, למשל פרטיות או זמינות בזמן שיבוש, וחיסרון אחד, למשל סיכון לגניבה או הקלה על פעילות לא מדווחת.
expected_points: A clear link to economic uncertainty
